  FreeBSD src repository

  Modified files:        (Branch: RELENG_6)
    usr.bin/tail         read.c 
  Log:
  MFC(1.14): Fixing a double free bug which will cause tail to dump core when
  there's no tailing newline(\n) character.
  
  PR:             bin/118267
  Reviewed by:    kib
  Approved by:    re (kensmith)
